steps.name: precheck-operator
steps.plan: 确认 Milvus CRD（milvuses.milvus.io）已注册（operator 就位）

steps.name: apply-cr
steps.plan:
将 apply：
apiVersion: milvus.io/v1beta1
kind: Milvus
metadata:
  name: e2e-milvus
  namespace: mb-e2e
spec:
  mode: standalone
  components:
    image: milvusdb/milvus:fix-switch
  dependencies:
    etcd:
      external: true
      endpoints:
      - e2e-etcd.mb-e2e.svc:2379
    storage:
      external: true
      type: MinIO
      endpoint: minio.mb-e2e.svc:80
      secretRef: e2e-milvus-minio
    msgStreamType: woodpecker
    woodpecker:
      external:
        endpoints:
        - e2e-wp-server-0.e2e-wp-server-headless.mb-e2e.svc:18080
        - e2e-wp-server-1.e2e-wp-server-headless.mb-e2e.svc:18080
        - e2e-wp-server-2.e2e-wp-server-headless.mb-e2e.svc:18080
        replicaCount: 3

audit: step 'wait-status' failed: e2e-milvus CR 未就绪（status.status=Pending）
